description: Maximum runtime USP expansion layer for the Power BI Expert-Replacement Factory.

capabilities.name: Question-to-Model Autopilot
capabilities.summary: Turn a process owner question into grain, facts, dimensions, relationships, and KPI contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst workshop is needed to translate the business question into a model-ready analytics scope.
acceptanceChecks: every KPI has owner and formula

capabilities.name: Source Discovery Autopilot
capabilities.summary: Profile source metadata and recommend native Power BI source routes without exposing secrets.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to inventory columns, types, nulls, row counts, and source fit by hand.

capabilities.name: AI Field Mapping Runtime
capabilities.summary: Generate field-mapping candidates and review gates from source profiles and process semantics.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to map every source column to semantic fields manually.

capabilities.name: KPI Ontology Runtime
capabilities.summary: Generate KPI synonym, formula, owner, and comparability records.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to reconcile KPI naming, metric meaning, and owner definitions manually.

capabilities.name: Root-Cause Path Builder
capabilities.summary: Generate drill paths from KPI breach to driver, segment, owner, case, and action.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually design root-cause navigation for each exception KPI.
acceptanceChecks: breach KPI has at least one driver

capabilities.name: Narrative Insight Writer
capabilities.summary: Create grounded executive and process-owner narratives from KPI, trend, variance, and exception evidence.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to write recurring management commentary from dashboard evidence.

capabilities.name: TMDL Compiler
capabilities.summary: Compile process model specs into TMDL tables, measures, relationships, and roles.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to hand-author baseline TMDL tables, measures, and relationship files.

capabilities.name: Full PBIP Generator
capabilities.summary: Generate a PBIP project skeleton for every industrial process.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to create the project folder, semantic model, report shell, or PBIP metadata manually.

capabilities.name: PBIR Visual Materializer
capabilities.summary: Materialize report page specs into PBIR page and visual container files.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to build the first report pages and visual bindings by hand.
acceptanceChecks: all visuals bind to known fields

capabilities.name: DAX Measure Factory
capabilities.summary: Generate governed DAX measures from KPI contracts and expected-result rules.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No DAX expert has to hand-write the standard KPI measure catalog.

capabilities.name: DAX Expected-Result Runner
capabilities.summary: Create executable DAX reconciliation contracts against process demo data.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to manually reconcile every generated measure against source totals.

capabilities.name: Power Query/M Factory
capabilities.summary: Generate native M templates for demo and production source patterns.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to hand-author routine Power Query ingestion and typing logic.

capabilities.name: Real Connector Runner Contracts
capabilities.summary: Define credential-safe runtime contracts for Excel, Folder, SQL, SharePoint, Fabric, Dataverse, OData, REST, SAP, and Snowflake.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to redesign connector execution and credential boundaries per project.

capabilities.name: Credential-Safe Runtime
capabilities.summary: Keep runtime secrets out of generated artifacts and store evidence only.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually scrub generated artifacts for credentials.

capabilities.name: Semantic Auto-Repair
capabilities.summary: Generate deterministic repair rules for source navigation, relationships, fields, and measures.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to diagnose common model, relationship, and visual-binding failures manually.

capabilities.name: Desktop/Frown Log Parser
capabilities.summary: Classify Desktop traces and Frown payloads against the Frown-to-Fix knowledge base.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to manually inspect Desktop logs before the first failure classification.

capabilities.name: Model Graph Quality Gate
capabilities.summary: Validate star schema direction, missing relationship columns, and ambiguous path risk.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No model expert has to manually inspect basic relationship correctness.

capabilities.name: Visual Binding Quality Gate
capabilities.summary: Validate generated report visuals against semantic model columns and measures.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to click through every visual just to find broken field bindings.

capabilities.name: Report Layout Scoring Runtime
capabilities.summary: Score report pages for density, hierarchy, actionability, and process-owner workflow fit.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No report expert has to manually review every first-pass layout against design rules.

capabilities.name: RLS Role Generator
capabilities.summary: Generate process-owner, manager, regional, and CoE RLS role contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to manually draft standard row-level security roles for each process pack.

capabilities.name: Process Mining Event Log Runtime
capabilities.summary: Normalize process event logs for mining tools and Power BI process flow analysis.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually shape case/activity/timestamp event logs.

capabilities.name: Action Cockpit Generator
capabilities.summary: Generate owner queues, action states, severity rules, and SLA breach follow-up structures.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually convert insights into owner-specific action lists.

capabilities.name: Tenant Readiness Runtime
capabilities.summary: Create tenant-readiness checks for gateway, capacity, sensitivity labels, RLS, and deployment pipelines.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to create a tenant readiness checklist from scratch.

capabilities.name: Deployment Pipeline Runtime
capabilities.summary: Generate Dev/Test/Prod deployment plans, approval gates, and rollback evidence.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually define routine deployment pipeline steps.

capabilities.name: Fabric Scaffold Runtime
capabilities.summary: Generate Lakehouse, Warehouse, Notebook, and Data Pipeline scaffold plans.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually outline common Fabric scaffolding for process analytics.

capabilities.name: Documentation Publisher Runtime
capabilities.summary: Publish process owner, CoE, model, KPI, release, and audit documentation manifests.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually assemble recurring model, KPI, and release documentation.

capabilities.name: Acceptance Evidence Packager
capabilities.summary: Package static checks, source evidence, KPI contracts, and generated artifact manifests into one release evidence record.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to manually compile proof that generated delivery artifacts are release-ready.

capabilities.name: Process Owner Acceptance Runtime
capabilities.summary: Generate business-facing acceptance criteria and signoff prompts from KPI and action-cockpit contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually translate technical outputs into process-owner acceptance language.

capabilities.name: Release Decision Copilot
capabilities.summary: Recommend release, repair, or escalation from validation, hardening, and evidence signals.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to manually synthesize every validation signal into the first release decision.

capabilities.name: Continuous Improvement Backlog
capabilities.summary: Turn validation warnings, layout scores, unmapped fields, and owner feedback into prioritized backlog items.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually maintain the improvement backlog after each generated delivery.

capabilities.name: Dashboard Consolidation Autopilot
capabilities.summary: Detect duplicate reports, overlapping KPIs, redundant pages, and consolidation candidates across a Power BI estate.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No expert has to manually compare report inventories to find redundant dashboards and rationalization targets.

capabilities.name: Legacy Report Reverse Engineer
capabilities.summary: Reverse engineer existing PBIX/PBIP structures into purpose, source, model, KPI, visual, and migration evidence.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually document legacy reports before modernization work can start.

capabilities.name: Business Question Simulator
capabilities.summary: Generate process-owner questions and verify whether model, KPIs, pages, and drill paths answer them.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually create coverage tests for common business questions.

capabilities.name: KPI Dispute Resolver
capabilities.summary: Detect conflicting KPI definitions across functions and generate decision options with owners and trade-offs.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually reconcile competing metric definitions across Finance, Sales, and Operations.

capabilities.name: Semantic Model Refactoring Autopilot
capabilities.summary: Find flat-table, snowflake, bad-grain, duplicate-measure, and relationship-quality issues and propose refactors.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No semantic modeling expert has to manually inspect routine model smells and draft refactoring actions.

capabilities.name: Executive Board Pack Generator
capabilities.summary: Generate management-ready pages, commentary, risks, decisions, and actions from process KPI evidence.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually prepare recurring executive packs from dashboard data.

capabilities.name: Power BI Performance Engineer
capabilities.summary: Create performance budgets and optimization plans for DAX, M, refresh, aggregations, and model shape.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No performance expert has to manually triage standard Power BI performance risks.

capabilities.name: Refresh Failure Triage Agent
capabilities.summary: Classify refresh failures across gateway, credentials, schema drift, timeout, folding, and source availability.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually classify routine refresh incidents before the first repair action.

capabilities.name: Data Contract Negotiator
capabilities.summary: Turn Power BI requirements into source-system data contracts with mandatory fields, types, freshness, SLA, and owner.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually translate report requirements into source-system contracts.

capabilities.name: Report UX Critic
capabilities.summary: Evaluate pages for scanability, actionability, visual overload, chart fit, drill paths, and process-owner workflow.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No report design expert has to manually perform the first UX quality review.

capabilities.name: DAX Explainability Layer
capabilities.summary: Explain measures in business language with filter context, dependencies, risks, and test scenarios.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No DAX expert has to manually document standard measure behavior for business and CoE review.

capabilities.name: Measure Dependency Impact Analyzer
capabilities.summary: Identify downstream reports, visuals, KPIs, and tests affected by measure, column, or table changes.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually trace dependency blast radius before changing a semantic model.

capabilities.name: RLS/OLS Attack Simulator
capabilities.summary: Test security roles for leakage, unsafe filters, missing personas, and dangerous sharing assumptions.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No security-focused Power BI expert has to manually design first-pass role leakage tests.

capabilities.name: Power BI CoE Certification Bot
capabilities.summary: Assign Draft, Trusted, Certified, or Blocked status from validation, governance, security, and evidence signals.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No CoE reviewer has to manually perform the first certification decision pass.

capabilities.name: Fabric Cost Guardrail
capabilities.summary: Estimate capacity, refresh, Direct Lake, Warehouse, Notebook, Pipeline, and redundancy cost risks.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No Fabric expert has to manually create the first cost-risk assessment for standard process analytics.

capabilities.name: Natural Language Data Mart Builder
capabilities.summary: Translate a process question into a data mart plan with grain, history, dimensions, facts, and refresh rules.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually draft the first data mart structure from a business question.

capabilities.name: Process Benchmark Pack
capabilities.summary: Compare process KPIs against internal, historical, or industry benchmark bands and flag unusual deviations.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually assemble benchmark comparisons for every process pack.

capabilities.name: Audit-Ready Evidence Vault
capabilities.summary: Assemble source, transformation, KPI, test, release, and owner-signoff evidence into audit-ready records.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No governance expert has to manually compile recurring audit evidence for generated BI deliveries.

capabilities.name: User Adoption Tracker
capabilities.summary: Track usage, stale pages, unused KPIs, low-value reports, and adoption gaps from telemetry contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually review adoption and report-value signals after release.

capabilities.name: Autonomous BI Sprint Manager
capabilities.summary: Plan and coordinate intake, source fit, model, report, tests, review, release, and backlog for a BI sprint.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No lead analyst or BI manager has to manually orchestrate the standard delivery sprint.

capabilities.name: PBIX Binary Intake
capabilities.summary: Ingest PBIX packages through a controlled binary-intake contract and extract report, model, source, and metadata evidence where available.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually unpack and document PBIX assets before migration or review.

capabilities.name: Live Tenant Scanner
capabilities.summary: Inventory workspaces, datasets, reports, refreshes, gateways, lineage, owners, and endorsements from a real Power BI tenant.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No tenant admin or CoE analyst has to manually inventory the Power BI estate.

capabilities.name: Power BI REST Deployer
capabilities.summary: Publish, rebind, refresh, endorse, and update Power BI artifacts through REST API execution contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually execute routine Power BI deployment API steps.

capabilities.name: Tabular Editor / TOM Bridge
capabilities.summary: Validate and patch tabular models through TOM, TMSL, or Tabular Editor compatible execution contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No tabular model developer has to manually run standard TOM/TMSL validation and patch routines.

capabilities.name: DAX Query Runner
capabilities.summary: Execute DAX queries against a model endpoint and compare measures to expected-result contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No DAX expert has to manually run routine validation queries against generated models.

capabilities.name: Query Folding Verifier
capabilities.summary: Verify Power Query folding capability through source-specific folding checks and fallback risk evidence.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No Power Query expert has to manually inspect every folding-sensitive transformation.

capabilities.name: Incremental Refresh Designer
capabilities.summary: Generate RangeStart/RangeEnd, partition policy, historical window, refresh window, and validation plan.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually design routine incremental refresh policies.

capabilities.name: Composite Model Advisor
capabilities.summary: Recommend Import, DirectQuery, Direct Lake, aggregations, hybrid tables, and composite model boundaries.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No model architect has to manually decide standard storage-mode trade-offs from scratch.

capabilities.name: Deployment Rollback Executor
capabilities.summary: Capture previous deployment state and execute rollback when release checks fail.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually restore a previous Power BI release after failed deployment.

capabilities.name: Gateway Configuration Auditor
capabilities.summary: Audit gateway clusters, datasources, credentials, mappings, owners, failover, and single points of failure.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No gateway specialist has to manually perform first-pass gateway readiness reviews.

capabilities.name: Sensitivity / Purview Classifier
capabilities.summary: Classify labels, endorsements, PII/PCI/financial fields, and Purview governance signals for generated BI assets.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No governance reviewer has to manually classify routine sensitivity and endorsement signals.

capabilities.name: Data Quality Profiler Runtime
capabilities.summary: Profile nulls, duplicates, outliers, referential integrity, freshness, and source totals against live or staged data.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually perform routine data-quality profiling before report delivery.

capabilities.name: Anomaly Detection Pack
capabilities.summary: Detect KPI anomalies, process breaks, seasonal deviations, and unusual segment movements.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually scan KPI trends for common anomalies and process breaks.

capabilities.name: Forecast / What-If Builder
capabilities.summary: Generate forecast, scenario, parameter, and what-if page contracts from process KPI histories.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually design standard forecast and what-if structures.

capabilities.name: Metric Store Connector
capabilities.summary: Connect KPI contracts to Fabric Metrics or centralized metric-store definitions and synchronization evidence.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No developer has to manually align generated KPI contracts with central metric-store records.

capabilities.name: Enterprise Glossary Sync
capabilities.summary: Synchronize KPI and field definitions with Purview, Collibra, DataHub, Atlan, or glossary export contracts.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually copy KPI and field definitions between BI artifacts and data catalogs.

capabilities.name: Ticketing Integration
capabilities.summary: Create Jira, Azure DevOps, or ServiceNow tickets from findings, actions, blockers, and owner queues.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No analyst has to manually transfer BI findings and release blockers into operational ticket queues.

capabilities.name: Access Review Automation
capabilities.summary: Review workspace roles, app audiences, dataset permissions, sharing links, and RLS personas on a schedule.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No access reviewer has to manually perform recurring Power BI permission reviews.

capabilities.name: Usage-Based Refactoring Agent
capabilities.summary: Prioritize report and model refactors from usage telemetry, performance history, refresh failures, and support signals.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No BI lead has to manually rank modernization work from scattered operational signals.

capabilities.name: Multi-Tenant / MSP Mode
capabilities.summary: Manage multiple customers or tenants with isolated policies, artifacts, evidence, rollout state, and governance boundaries.
capabilities.replacementOutcome: No MSP delivery lead has to manually separate tenant policies, artifacts, and rollout evidence.
